title: The Long Shot: The 1993 Bosnian Basketball Team
original_title: The Long Shot: The 1993 Bosnian Basketball Team
overview: A feature length documentary about the journey of the Bosnian basketball team from the heart of a war torn city to the 1993 European Championship.
